s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By using Drave Registry services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not use our services.

s2.title: 2. Domain Registration
s2.body: Domain registrations are subject to the policies of the applicable registry and ICANN. You are responsible for ensuring your registration does not infringe on third-party rights.

s3.title: 3. Payments & Refunds
s3.body: All fees are non-refundable except as expressly stated. Hosting plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee. Domain registrations may be refunded within 5 days of registration.

s4.title: 4. Account Responsibility
s4.body: You are solely responsible for all activity conducted through your account. Keep your login credentials secure and notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

s5.title: 5. Service Availability
s5.body: We strive for 99.9% uptime. Scheduled maintenance will be announced in advance. We are not liable for interruptions beyond our reasonable control.

s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
s1.body: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email, address), payment details processed securely via PCI-compliant processors, and technical data including IP addresses and usage logs.

s2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
s2.body: Your information is used to provide and improve our services, process payments, communicate with you about your account, and comply with legal obligations. We never sell your personal data to third parties.

s3.title: 3. WHOIS Privacy
s3.body: We provide free WHOIS privacy protection on eligible domains. When enabled, our proxy information replaces your personal data in public WHOIS databases.

s4.title: 4. Data Security
s4.body: We employ industry-standard security measures including 256-bit SSL encryption, PCI DSS compliant payment processing, and regular security audits to protect your data.

s5.title: 5. Your Rights
s5.body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data. Contact privacy@draveregistry.com to exercise these rights.

trust.title: Trust Center
trust.subtitle: Our commitment to security, privacy, and transparency.
